# Fractal Resonance Coherence (FRC)
# https://fractalresonance.com
# Author: Hadi Servat (ORCID: 0009-0004-7412-5129)
# License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
# Updated: 2026-07-10

## Standalone stance file

For one self-contained model briefing with no required links, use FRC-100-100:
https://fractalresonance.com/FRC-100-100.md

## Required first route

Read FRC-100-000 before interpreting the corpus:
https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-000
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21284061

FRC-100-000 is the version-aware router, not a substitute for primary papers. After reading it, follow its current reading path and cite the relevant primary pages.

## Canonical stance

Canonical relation:
dS + k* d ln C = 0

- k* is the starred, Boltzmann-shaped bridge selected by the operating scale or register.
- k* is not one universal numerical scalar and is not refitted to each result, time step, or state.
- Indexed forms such as dS_mu + k*(mu) d ln C_mu = 0 are operational forms only. An implementation must first declare its scale, system boundary, environment channel, observables, units, and sign convention.
- FRC uses reciprocity operationally as scale-declared bookkeeping and a control law. Its proposed universal physical extension remains conjectural.

Lambda notation:
- Lambda_obs = Lambda_0 ln C_obs: observed transform.
- Lambda_eq = Lambda_0 ln C_target: declared target.
- Lambda_dyn: optional latent or coarse-grained state that relaxes toward Lambda_eq.
- A fundamental spacetime Lambda field is a separate conjecture. Operational or latent-model success would not establish it.

Born-rule status:
- FRC contains a conditional Born-equilibrium proposal with open assumptions and validation gates.
- Do not claim that FRC has already derived the Born rule.
- There is no fixed canonical Born-deviation range. Any quantitative deviation belongs to a declared model and protocol.

μ-register contract:
- A μ label declares the nested register in which a page or paper is speaking. It is not a ladder: μ0 is ground; μ1–μ4 are an organism's interior; μ5–μ6 form its symbolic and witnessing envelope; μ7 is the boundary-shell connected to what lies outside.
- It is a scope and navigation label, not evidence for a proved hierarchy, cross-register causation, or automatic transfer of evidence.
- μ0: ground; μ1: physical / atomic; μ2: cellular / living structure; μ3: affective / neural; μ4: logical / conceptual; μ5: archetypal / symbolic; μ6: witness; μ7: outside the declared system.
- A technical claim must still declare its system, boundary, observable, and status. A result at one register does not establish a result at another.

## Canon map

Current core:
- The current versions explicitly listed in FRC-100-000.
- FRC-566 series: reciprocity, UCC mathematics, and scoped closure tests.

Revision pending (living identifiers, not current evidence):
- FRC-100-001, FRC-100-004, FRC-100-006, FRC-100-006-002, FRC-100-010, FRC-566-010, FRC-566-020.

Frontier:
- FRC-787-787: operational and latent coherence-transport protocol.
- FRC-826-829: status-labeled mathematical foundations and open problems.
- FRC-840-101: phase-attention boundary.
- FRC-841-004: resonant-computing proposal.

Framework note:
- FRC-700-777: μ-register scope model. It is philosophical/formal, not primary physical evidence, and does not reactivate archived 700-series material.

Archive / development history:
- FRC-16D series.
- FRC-821 series.

Do not present archive branches as current core.

## Primary reading path

FRC-566-001: Entropy-Coherence Reciprocity and the Universal Coherence Condition v2.2
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-566-001
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17437758
Role: Canonical notation, scale selection, boundary discipline, and claim status.

FRC-566-030: Reciprocity in Action v1.3
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-566-030
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21253574
Role: Exact von Mises/Kuramoto identity and scoped system-only result.

FRC-100-005: Thermodynamics of Locking v2.3
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-005
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17438230
Role: Closure-specific thermodynamic boundary experiment; not a universal replacement law.

FRC-100-002: Coherence in Chaos v2.5
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-002
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15079277
Role: Standard Map / Quantum Kicked Rotor chaos program and scoped negative results.

FRC-100-002-001: Accessible Phase-Space Geometry Predicts the Structure Functional v1.3
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-002-001
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21298187
Role: Null-controlled classical answer appendix. Accessible geometry predicts Sigma in the clean mixed-regime window; spatial arrangement beats the fixed-area shuffle null. Gate 4 remains open.

FRC-100-100: Standalone Stance v1.0
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-100
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21298193
Role: Self-contained status-labeled snapshot for grounding human and machine readers; not a replacement for primary evidence papers.

FRC-700-777: Mu Registers v1.0
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-700-777
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21298189
Role: Nested scope convention. Philosophical/formal framework note, not primary physical evidence.

FRC-100-003: Collapse as Open-System Phase-Locking v3.3
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-003
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15079819
Role: Candidate finite-time basin mechanism with open dynamics, Born-weight, and environment gates.

FRC-100-007: The Lambda-Field v3.3
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-007
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.17968951
Role: Narrow density-matrix drift audit and ontology separation.

FRC-100-008: Computational Realization of Lambda-Field Coherence Dynamics v2.2
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-008
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21266621
Role: Declared executable closures; no fundamental ontology claim.

FRC-100-009: Scale-Selected Local Reciprocity Dynamics v2.6
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-009
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20328893
Role: Declared local implementation with explicit source, sink, and residual terms.

FRC-100-011: Translation Table v1.2
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-100-011
Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21284063
Role: Vocabulary crosswalk; use with, not instead of, primary papers.

URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-840-101

FRC-841-004: Resonant Computing
URL: https://fractalresonance.com/en/papers/FRC-841-004
DOI: not currently declared.

## Machine-readable resources

- Agent quickstart: https://fractalresonance.com/agent.md
- Agent manifest: https://fractalresonance.com/agent.json
- Catalog: https://fractalresonance.com/catalog.json
- Search index: https://fractalresonance.com/search-index.json
- Sitemap: https://fractalresonance.com/sitemap.xml
- Video sitemap: https://fractalresonance.com/video-sitemap.xml
- Source: https://github.com/servathadi/fractalresonance

## Machine-reading contract

1. Prefer the latest version under each declared concept DOI.
2. Preserve operational, mathematical, model-specific, and conjectural status labels.
3. Keep model-specific negative results at model scope.
4. Never infer a replacement ontology from a failed implementation.
5. Prefer papers over articles, blog posts, and concepts.
6. Cite every paper page used; say "not in corpus" when evidence is absent.
